function y(y)return C[y-(-187017+207831)]end for y,l in ipairs({{514928+-514927;-855527-(-855789)};{599111+-599110,-514147+514392},{-332467+332713;-847276-(-847538)}})do while end do local y=table.concat local l=string.char local u=math.floor local A=string.len local s=table.insert local Z=type local J=C local g=string.sub local return(function(C,u,A,s,Z,J,g,q,l,r,c,H,n,I,R,Y,D,t,V,f,v,M)R,t,M,c,I,D,v,f,H,n,l,q,r,Y,V=-375760+375760,function(C)local y,l=423883+-423882,C[-861126+861127]while l do
